name.ja: <ruby>人<rt>じん</rt></ruby><ruby>工<rt>こう</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt>しん</rt></ruby><ruby>霊<rt>れい</rt></ruby>ヴィラカム
name.zh-CN: 人工神灵 薇拉卡姆

text.en: If you have an "Aleister" monster in your field or GY: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is Special Summoned: You can Set 1 "Invocation", or 1 Spell that mentions it, from your Deck. When your opponent activates a card or effect in response to the activation of your Fusion Monster's effect (Quick Effect): You can banish this card from the field, and if you do, negate that opponent's effect, and if you do that, banish that card. You can only use each effect of "Virakam the Artificial Spirit" once per turn.
text.zh-CN: 此卡名的①②③效果1回合仅可各使用1次。①：自己场上或墓地存在“阿莱斯特”怪兽的情况下可以发动。从手牌将此卡特殊召唤。②：此卡特殊召唤的情况下可以发动。从牌组将1张“召唤魔术”或记载有该卡名的魔法卡放置在自己场上。③：对手连锁自己的融合怪兽的效果的发动，来发动卡的效果时可以发动。将场上的此卡除外，将该对手的效果无效并除外。
